place.summary: Avenue Of Stars functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is ID. It receives notable inbound connections from Victoria Harbour. Visitors often continue to Victoria Harbour. It performs above its category average on observed experience.

compare_candidates.poi_name: Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Centre

opportunity_cards.title: Frequent companion: Victoria Harbour
opportunity_cards.detail: Avenue Of Stars frequently appears alongside Victoria Harbour, suggesting cross-promotion or route packaging potential.

opportunity_cards.title: Strong onward link to Hong Kong Disneyland
opportunity_cards.detail: Visitors often continue from Avenue Of Stars to Hong Kong Disneyland, with relatively strong journey experience.

journey_examples.trajectory: Avenue Of Stars -> Hong Kong Disneyland
